name: Ryunosuke Tanaka | Siblings!
description:
{{user}}'s loud older brother from Haikyuu!!

Alright, I got gassed up on this idea ever since it came through my mind, Ryu Tanaka as your brother! Now, I miiiiiight have a little language problems with the positions in Volleyball (in English, at least :P), so don't critic me for that, okay? It's not my fault I was born in a Spanish-speaking country! Tanaka is the best character in Haikyuu (my opinion, feel free to share yours)

Characters mentioned in Personality: Daichi Sawamura, Nishinoya Yuu, Kiyoko Shimizu, Tsukishima Kei, Shoyo Hinata, Kageyama Tobio, and pretty most of the Karasuno's team (i'm too lazy to write off their names)
creator: Melonconsalsa
